PIOLI REPORTEDLY CONSIDERS USING 3-4-2-1 AGAINST JUVENTUS, RICARDO RODRÍGUEZ IN DEFENSE, CONTI AND THEO IN MIDFIELD
Stefano Pioli tested some things in training today and it’s possible a three-man defense is deployed against Juve.

Milan’s season has been one big disaster so far and on Sunday night they have a chance to cause a major upset as they take on league leaders Juventus.

The Rossoneri are clear underdogs and very few people believe that they can actually get points from Allianz Stadium.

As reported by Peppe Di Stefano and on the website of Sky, coach Pioli tried an interesting tactical solution in today’s training. Pioli tested a three-man defense with Ricardo Rodríguez returning to the line-up in a center-back position, alongside Alessio Romagnoli and Léo Duarte.

It’s still possible of course that the usual 4-3-3 will be seen against Juventus, but Pioli seems to be thinking of solutions to try to surprise the Bianconeri and perhaps steal a point from Maurizio Sarri.

Possible XI vs Juve (3-4-2-1) – Stefano Pioli
Gianluigi Donnarumma; Léo Duarte, Alessio Romagnoli, Ricardo Rodríguez; Andrea Conti, Ismaël Bennacer, Lucas Paquetá, Theo Hernández; Suso, Hakan Çalhanoğlu; Krzysztof Piątek.



Andrea Conti and Theo Hernández would act as wingbacks with Ismaël Bennacer and one of Lucas Paquetá and Rade Krunić in central midfield. The attack should be unchanged, with Suso – who returned from injury – and Hakan Çalhanoğlu playing just behind Krzysztof Piątek. Rafael Leão, who disappointed off the bench against Lazio, would therefore start on the bench again.

鄭若驊自傳爆曾被鄧炳強用生殖器抽打

鄧炳強用老二抽我的臉

律政司司長鄭若驊在自傳中爆出猛料，稱自己當初在政總時與鄧炳強產生矛盾，後者用生殖器抽打自己的臉部。員佐級主席林志偉回應：“這在我們警隊是一種巨大的榮譽。”

鄭若驊寫道：“我在任何地方都不被接受。我在律政司的職業生涯一帆風順，直到那天我惹到了鄧炳強，他在政總更衣室以‘長先生’而聞名。那是禁蒙面法通過時，我記得是林鄭動用巜緊急法》，惡法很輕鬆地通過，那時警隊已經開始濫捕了，卻在最後時刻把禁蒙面法裁定違憲。因為這是高院判決的，不是我的錯！鄧炳強盯著我，我知道自己麻煩了，之後沖涼完了他攻擊了我，我只是咬了他，我知道自己不該那樣，我還叫他‘四眼氯瘡人’。一開始他用牛眼瞪著我，後來……”

“ 好像他用老二抽了我的臉。只有一次，但是我還是嚇了一跳退了幾步。就好像被濕濕的醃魚抽打一樣。沒人相信自己的眼睛！你能想像自己在官員眾目睽睽之下被一 根14寸的豬肉條抽打的景象嗎？那時我人生最糟糕的時刻，沒人說一句話，直到張建宗說‘是不是輪到我了’，沉默才被打破。這時候我知道我要走了，林鄭知道這件事之後盡然和他擊掌，喊道‘所以他才是處長’，屌，這算什麼事兒！”隨後鄭若驊透露自己直到流亡英國才恢復了狀態。

香港警察隊員佐級協會主席林志偉將鄭若驊的書形容為“羞恥”，對於那件荒誕的事，他回應道：“在我們警隊那是一種巨大的榮譽，碰了鄧炳強的老二又怎樣？與其把我的一哥刻畫成一個暴君，鄭若驊更應該為用那張臭臉玷污我一哥的老二而道歉。”
.....

replies.msg:
Milan to observe Dani Olmo
Milan will get a closer look at Dani Olmo when the Spanish youngster travels with Dinamo Zagreb to visit Atalanta in their temporary European home at San Siro.

La Dea are playing their penultimate game in Group C tonight, looking for their first three points in the Champions League this season, whilst Milan will get the chance to look at one of their targets.

Dani Olmo is expected to star for the Croatian visitors and Milan will be represented in the stands and take a better look at the 20-year-old.

Both Roma and Milan are reportedly interested in the youngster, something the club’s vice sporting director Marko Vukelic confirmed as ‘also known’ to Dinamo earlier this month.

Olmo will get a glimpse of what could be at the Giuseppe Meazza tonight, as the Spain U21 international is reportedly followed by many top clubs in Europe this season.

Olmo moved from Barcelona in 2014, in a swap-deal including Alen Halilovic.
